dc:title: Touring Bicycle Beside a Rural Road and Harvested Fields
dc:description: A loaded touring bicycle is parked in the foreground against a roadside metal guardrail. The bicycle has drop handlebars, a front cylindrical roll, water bottles on the frame, and large rear panniers or soft bags secured with straps and cords. Behind the guardrail are dry grasses and a broad, harvested field extending across rolling terrain. Low hills, scrub-covered mounds, and distant ridgelines appear on the horizon beneath an open sky with light cloud cover. No people are visible.
condition_note: Colors unverified; image programmatically inverted from faded source negative.
